By + large "Valis" gives a correct formulation of the entire situation. But I now see VALIS as the point of it all rather than just a solution to a problem ( maybe these two views are the same).

Perhaps the first builder(s) (creator) botched the job + created something irreal + irrational, itself being irrational + into which a higher wiser -+ rational - [deity] has introduced VALIS, whose job it is is to convert the irreal to real, the irrational to the rational. this could be the dialectic I
